error.message: File does not end with a newline.
Extra separation in import group before 'jhn.handlers.JsonHandler'
Each variable declaration must be in its own statement.
Variable 'time' must be private and have accessor methods.

String literal expressions should be on the left side of an equals comparison.
'if' has incorrect indentation level 16, expected level should be 12.
'if' child has incorrect indentation level 20, expected level should be 16.
'if rcurly' has incorrect indentation level 16, expected level should be 12.
'if' child has incorrect indentation level 16, expected level should be 12.
'if rcurly' has incorrect indentation level 12, expected level should be 8.
'}' at column 13 should be on the same line as the next part of a multi-block statement (one that directly contains multiple blocks: if/else-if/else, do/while or try/catch/finally).
